images.title: Herbier à zostères (Ifremer 00615-72722 - 35535).jpg
images.description: Eelgrass is also called "sea grass" or "marine kelp", forming meadows comparable to terrestrial meadows. These meadows are found on intertidal and infralittoral sandy and muddy sediments of coasts, particularly in the Northern Hemisphere (Atlantic Ocean, English Channel-North Sea, Mediterranean). In this series of half-air / half-water photos, taken from Lilia beach in Plouguerneau, we can also see the Île Vierge lighthouse in the background.
